LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

DEFENDANT FIDELITY AND DEPOSIT COMPANY OF MARYLAND?S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STAY ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION, PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66065579) FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY AND DEPOSIT COMPANY OF MARYLAND HEARING SET FOR NOV-25-2020 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-25-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FIDELITY AND DEPOSIT COMPANY OF MARYLAND'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND MUST EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FIDELITY AND DEPOSIT COMPANY OF MARYLAND's Motion To Stay Action Pending Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
